title: external-agents agents.json
description: Contract for agents.json: the caller picks one effort tier (low|medium|high|xhigh) and each agent's tier maps it to a (model, optional native effort, optional agy-only fallback). Read by scripts/run-agent.sh via jq or python3.

_comment.description: Free-form documentation; ignored by the driver.

default_tier.description: Effort tier used when --effort is not passed.

agents.description: Map of agent name to its config. Only the agy agent's tiers may carry a 'fallback'; every other agent uses the no-fallback tier shape.

model.description: Model id passed to the agent CLI for this tier.

effort.description: Native effort level (codex/claude only); agy/cursor bake the tier into the model name.

model.description: Primary model id; for agy 3rd-party tiers, spent only when antigravity-usage confirms quota.

effort.description: Native effort level; agy bakes the tier into the model name.

fallback.description: Larger-limit Gemini model used when the primary's quota is unconfirmed. agy-only.

enabled.description: Whether this agent runs under --agent all.
Whether this agent runs under --agent all.
